title: woodsia taishanensis
intro: Woodsia taishanensis, a type of fern known as the Chinese cliff fern, is a rare and endangered plant species native to China. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its ability to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Woodsia taishanensis can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is often combined with other plants in traditional Chinese medicine to enhance its health benefits.
